channel.title: (liquid plus liquid) equilibria; methyl palmitate; paraxylene; benzene;toluene; phenol; molar fraction; methyl hexadecanoate on LMI
channel.description: Recent content in (liquid plus liquid) equilibria; methyl palmitate; paraxylene; benzene;toluene; phenol; molar fraction; methyl hexadecanoate on LMI

item.title: Tar Removal From Biosyngas In The Biomass Gasification Process. (Liquidplus Liquid) Equilibrium Water Plus Solvent (Paraxylene And Methylhexadecanoate) Plus Model Molecules Of Tar (Benzene, Toluene, Phenol)
